rationale: The cited paper is used for a concrete methodological role, not just as broad background. In Study 1b, the authors explicitly adopt an objective digit-span alertness task and cite Irmak, Block, and Fitzsimons (2005) as prior use of that measure. This measurement is part of their process evidence for how lighting affects food choice, so the citation function is meaningful even though it is not central to their core theorizing.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a method precedent from the cited paper by using its digit-span style alertness task to operationalize mental alertness in a new context (ambient light and food choice). The citation supports the design of the process test rather than serving as a major theoretical base.
